bird.name: Brush bronzewing
bird.summary: The brush bronzewing (Phaps elegans) is a species of bird in the pigeon family, Columbidae. It is endemic to Australia, with two biogeograp…

relations.subject: Brush bronzewing
relations.evidence: The brush bronzewing is listed as a species of Least Concern on the IUCN Red List and considered by BirdLife Australia to have secure populations in all states it occurs in. Like many other ground-dwelling bird species, the bronze brushwing is threatened by introduced predators such as cats and foxes
relations.object_summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。
